The '''Hapan Royal Court''' was the extended royal household in the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] that advised the [[Queen Mother]] on issues that were important. Membership included representatives from each [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Hapan [[Consortium]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
